source: NvChad - NvChad UI: NvimTree: opening the explorer, moving between windows, and tree navigation keys

questions.q: Which plugin provides NvChad's file explorer?
Which combination opens/closes NvimTree, and in which mode?
options: Ctrl + n, available only in NORMAL mode
questions.why: Ctrl+n toggles NvimTree and only works in NORMAL mode.

questions.q: To move between the explorer window and the editor window you use...
questions.why: Ctrl+h and Ctrl+l switch windows left/right.

questions.q: In NvimTree, which key toggles showing hidden (dotfile) entries?
Which keys expand the whole tree and collapse it again?
questions.why: E expands the entire tree; W collapses it.

questions.q: The f key starts interactive search, but it is confined to...
options: the folder NvimTree is currently in (open the whole tree with E first for a global search)
questions.why: Search stays in the current folder unless you E-expand first.

questions.q: NvChad's default mapping to move the cursor into the file tree (focus it) is...
Navigating with > and < is confined to the current folder; which key returns you up to the workspace?
questions.why: Ctrl+p goes up to the folder you opened the editor from (the workspace).
